object_kinds.description: Deterministic coarse spatial partition object representing a galaxy-scale generation cell.
Deterministic star-system scale procedural or authored object anchored to a GEO cell lineage.
Deterministic stellar object anchored to a GEO cell lineage and local subkey ordering.
Deterministic planetary object anchored to a GEO cell lineage and local subkey ordering.
Deterministic satellite body anchored to a GEO cell lineage and local subkey ordering.
Deterministic GAL-1 compact-object stub anchored to a galaxy cell lineage for the central supermassive black hole proxy.

stability.rationale: Conservative provisional classification for GAL-1 galaxy object stub kinds; stub kind ids remain loadable but will be replaced by ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics systems.
stability.replacement_target: Replace GAL-1 compact object stub kinds with ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics semantics.

object_kinds.description: Deterministic GAL-1 nebula stub anchored to a galaxy cell lineage for sparse procedural environmental points of interest.

stability.rationale: Conservative provisional classification for GAL-1 galaxy object stub kinds; stub kind ids remain loadable but will be replaced by ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics systems.
stability.replacement_target: Replace GAL-1 compact object stub kinds with ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics semantics.

object_kinds.description: Deterministic GAL-1 remnant stub anchored to a galaxy cell lineage for sparse procedural hazard and lore hooks.

stability.rationale: Conservative provisional classification for GAL-1 galaxy object stub kinds; stub kind ids remain loadable but will be replaced by ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics systems.
stability.replacement_target: Replace GAL-1 compact object stub kinds with ASTRO-DOMAIN lifecycle and gas dynamics semantics.

object_kinds.description: Deterministic surface or atlas tile object derived from a GEO partition cell.
Deterministic interior-space partition object derived from a GEO partition cell.
Deterministic built or authored structure object anchored to a GEO cell lineage.
Deterministic vehicle or mobile assembly object anchored to a GEO cell lineage when spatially indexed.
Deterministic logic or signaling node anchored to a GEO cell lineage when spatialized.
Deterministic logic network aggregate anchored to a GEO cell lineage and stable local subkey.
